GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [supplier_cnt@3 DESC, p_brand@0 ASC NULLS LAST, p_type@1 ASC NULLS LAST, p_size@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[supplier_cnt@3 DESC, p_brand@0 ASC NULLS LAST, p_type@1 ASC NULLS LAST, p_size@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[p_brand@0 as p_brand, p_type@1 as p_type, p_size@2 as p_size, count(alias1)@3 as supplier_cnt]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[p_brand, p_type, p_size], aggr=[count(alias1)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_brand@0, p_type@1, p_size@2], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[p_brand, p_type, p_size], aggr=[count(alias1)]
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[p_brand, p_type, p_size, alias1], aggr=[]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_brand@0, p_type@1, p_size@2, alias1@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[p_brand, p_type, p_size, alias1], aggr=[]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=RightAnti, on=[(s_suppkey@0, ps_suppkey@0)]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=s_comment@1 LIKE %Customer%Complaints%, projection=[0]
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ps_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ps_suppkey@3 as ps_suppkey, p_brand@0 as p_brand, p_type@1 as p_type, p_size@2 as p_size]
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(p_partkey@0, ps_partkey@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=p_brand@1 != Brand#45 AND p_type@2 NOT LIKE MEDIUM POLISHED% AND (p_size@3 = 49 OR p_size@3 = 14 OR p_size@3 = 23 OR p_size@3 = 45 OR p_size@3 = 19 OR p_size@3 = 3 OR p_size@3 = 36 OR p_size@3 = 9)
                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ps_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
  GpuSortExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
              GpuAggregateExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168

                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168

                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                        GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                GpuFilterExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                    GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                              GpuProjectExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=168

                                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                                          GpuFilterExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152

                                              GpuScanExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=76

                                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
